S.FORM: George Armitage kawas tay 1942 George Armitage, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
George Armitage kawas tay 1942 George Armitage, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ɣeorɣe armitaɣe kawas~ɕ taj **** ɣeorɣe armitaɣe, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
